# Kerala Coders Cafe

Kerala Coders Cafe is a vibrant community of developers, builders, and learners from Kerala. 

## About Us
Our mission is to foster a local ecosystem where developers can learn, build side projects, and contribute to open-source software. We support local chapters across major Kerala cities such as Kochi, Thiruvananthapuram, and Kozhikode.

## Useful Links
- Official Website: https://kcc.sh
- GitHub: https://github.com/KERALACODERSCAFE
- Projects: https://kcc.sh/projects
- Teams: https://kcc.sh/teams
- Events: https://kcc.sh/events

## Focus Areas
- Open Source Contribution
- Networking and Mentorship
- Building Real-World Projects
- Hackathons and Tech Meetups
